attachments.text: Exporting Gmail emails to PST is easy with the MacSonik Gmail Backup Tool for Mac. This tool securely converts Gmail mailbox data, including emails and attachments, into PST format while keeping the folder structure intact. Simply launch the tool, log in to your Gmail account, select the folders you want to export, choose PST as the saving format, and click Convert. It also offers filters to expor…
